reason: The image depicts a Benedictine monk, presumably Gratian, working on his Decretum in what appears to be a medieval scriptorium. The stone walls, candles, stacked manuscripts, quill, and simple clothing are generally consistent with the period. However, the monk's robe appears to be overly stylized and modernly designed. He also has on a chain necklace, which seems out of place. While such items did exist during this period, the style of the one shown is atypical and might indicate more modern jewelry trends. Oil paintings did not become prominent in Gothic decoration until later on in the Gothic period.
